title: Baz
content:
{{Top|ga}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Baz |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human]][[Tarkin (novel)|''Tarkin'']] |gender=[[Gender|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Navy's officer corps]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Nothing to say for yourself, Ensign?''"
"''Nothing at this time, sir.''"
"''I thought not.|Tarkin accuses Baz of spice use|audio=Tarkin-NothingToSay.flac|}} '''Baz''' was a [[Gender|male]] [[human]] who served the [[Galactic Empire]]'s [[Imperial Navy]] as an [[ensign]] during the early [[Standard year|years]] of its reign. He was assigned to serve on [[Sentinel Base]], a construction project under the command of [[Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin]] on a [[Sentinel moon|moon]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories]]. While there he used [[spice]], a drug which affected his performance. While traveling on board the ''[[Carrion Spike]]'', Tarkin's personal [[Starship|ship]], during a journey it made in [[14 BBY]] to the [[planet]] [[Coruscant]] from Sentinel Base, Tarkin noticed signs indicating Baz's spice use and had him confined to his quarters. ==Biography== {{Quote|A touch of hyperspace nausea, sir.''"
"''Perhaps. But nausea doesn't account for the fact that the thumb and index finger of your right hand bear yellow-ocher stains, which are often the result of pinching plugs of spice that hasn't been sufficiently processed. I observe, too, that your left eyetooth reveals what appears to be a nascent cavity, such as might be caused by dipping spice.|Tarkin points out the signs indicating Baz uses spice|audio=Tarkin-ATouchofHyperspaceNausea.flac|}} [[File:Tarkin-Vader.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Wilhuff Tarkin discovered Baz's spice abuse.]] The [[Gender|male]] [[human]] Baz served the [[Galactic Empire]] during the early [[Standard year|years]] of its reign over [[the galaxy]], and by [[14 BBY]]''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of [[Tarkin (novel)|''Tarkin'']] to [[14 BBY]]. held the junior [[Imperial officer|officer]] rank of [[ensign]] in the [[Imperial Navy]]. During that year, he was stationed on [[Sentinel Base]], an Imperial project on a [[Sentinel moon|moon]] in an [[Sentinel Base system|unnamed system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories]], where construction of a [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station|superweapon]] was secretly taking place under the command of [[Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin]]. While at the base, Baz would take [[spice]], a type of illicit drug, while hidden in an area of Sentinel's motor pool repair bay outside the auxiliary dome, which was not covered by [[security camera]]s. On one such occasion he stood near a [[T-44 landspeeder]] in a section of the bay close to a landing platform undergoing repairs, which left a circular lubricant stain impregnated with grit on his left [[boot]]. The spice use caused Baz to arrive late to his duties several times and act inattentively when he did, which was included in his record. Some of the plugs of spice he used were not properly processed, and so stained his fingers when he pinched them. Following a brief [[attack on Sentinel Base]] by a [[Berch Teller's rebel cell|rebel cell]] led by former [[Republic Intelligence]] [[agent]] [[Berch Teller]], Tarkin was summoned to the Imperial capital [[Coruscant]], and Baz was selected to serve as a midshipman on board the Moff's personal [[starship]], the ''[[Carrion Spike]]''. Once the vessel left Sentinel Base and entered [[hyperspace]], Tarkin summoned eighteen members of the ship's crew, including Baz, to the ship's conference room for an impromptu inspection. While he looked over the crew, Tarkin's attention was drawn to the stain on Baz's boot, which the ensign claimed was [[hair gel]]. Tarkin recognized the stain as lubricant however, and revealed that he knew about the areas of the repair bay used by spice users. After pointing out several other pieces of evidence that Baz indulged in spice, Tarkin ordered a [[Unidentified Imperial petty officer (Carrion Spike)|petty officer]] to confine Baz to his quarters for the rest of the journey, claiming he would deal with the ensign once they reached Coruscant. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|You're sweating, Ensign. Are you certain you're fit for duty?|Tarkin questions Baz|audio=Tarkin-YoureSweatingEnsign.flac|}} Baz had unruly [[Color|brown]] hair cut to Imperial regulation length, which he attempted to tame with hair gel in preparation for inspections. His dipping of spice left a nascent cavity in his left [[Tooth|eyetooth]], and pinching unprocessed plugs of the substance left yellow-ochre stains on the index finger and thumb of his right [[Limb|hand]]. The spice also caused him to be unpunctual and inattentive, and during Tarkin's inspection Baz's [[eye]]s were bloodshot, his gaze unsteady and he sweated noticeably, which he blamed on hyperspace nausea. ==Equipment== {{Quote|Remove your cap.|Tarkin inspects Baz's hair for hair gel|audio=Tarkin-RemoveYourCap.flac|}} Baz wore the [[Imperial military uniforms|Imperial uniform]] standard for all officers, which had a slightly longer tunic, slimmer trousers, and a lower thread count than the uniform made personally for Tarkin. The uniform also included a [[Hat|cap]]. ==Behind the scenes== Baz appeared in [[Tarkin (novel)|''Tarkin'']], a [[2014]] novel written by [[James Luceno]]. ==Appearances== *[[Tarkin (novel)|''Tarkin'']] {{Ab|Tarkin (audiobook)}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Baz |fr=Baz |ja=バズ（少尉） |pl=Baz |pt=Baz }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
